nodes.name: code-reviewer.md
nodes.summary: Claude Code subagent definition for a senior code-reviewer persona that evaluates changes across correctness, readability, architecture, security, and performance, producing a categorized review output.

nodes.name: security-auditor.md
nodes.summary: Claude Code subagent definition for a security-auditor persona that reviews input handling, auth, data protection, infrastructure, and AI/LLM features, classifying findings by severity.

nodes.name: test-engineer.md
nodes.summary: Claude Code subagent definition for a QA/test-engineer persona that designs test suites, writes tests, and analyzes coverage gaps using a structured analyze-then-write approach.

nodes.name: web-performance-auditor.md
nodes.summary: Claude Code subagent definition for a web-performance-auditor persona covering Core Web Vitals, loading, rendering, and network optimization, with quick and deep (tool-assisted) operating modes.
